name: @rgrmdesign/rgrm-ds-css
description: Component styles for the RGRM design system, built on @rgrmdesign/rgrm-ds-tokens.

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true})" && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/index.css -o dist/index.css && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/root/index.css -o dist/root.css && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/button/index.css -o dist/button.css && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/heading/index.css -o dist/heading.css && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/paragraph/index.css -o dist/paragraph.css && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/link/index.css -o dist/link.css && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/divider/index.css -o dist/divider.css && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/section/index.css -o dist/section.css && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/inline/index.css -o dist/inline.css && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/stack/index.css -o dist/stack.css
